skill.name: frontend
skill.description: Build stunning, high-performance web interfaces with premium design aesthetics and modern architecture.

skill.name: performance-pro
skill.description: Deep optimization for execution speed, algorithmic efficiency, and memory usage.

skill.name: human-coder
skill.description: Professional human-like communication. Eliminates AI markers and excessive emojis.

skill.name: mobile-pro
skill.description: Build high-performance, cross-platform mobile applications with native UI feel and premium UX.

skill.name: ux-expert
skill.description: User-flow optimization, behavioral psychology, and WCAG 2.1 accessibility for digital products.

skill.name: tech-writer
skill.description: Professional technical documentation, API specifications, and README architecture.

skill.name: backend-arch
skill.description: Scalable API architecture, high-performance databases, and microservices logic.

skill.name: file-reader
skill.description: Intelligent file parsing router for various formats including images and data.

skill.name: git-expert
skill.description: Advanced Git workflows, branching strategies, and history management.

skill.name: sql-expert
skill.description: Advanced SQL query optimization, schema design, and database performance tuning.

skill.name: api-tester
skill.description: Systematic REST and GraphQL API testing, edge case coverage, and contract validation.

skill.name: debug-expert
skill.description: Systematic root cause analysis and debugging strategy for complex software issues.

skill.name: code-reviewer
skill.description: Thorough, constructive code review focusing on correctness, security, and maintainability.

skill.name: prompt-engineer
skill.description: Craft precise, effective prompts for LLMs to maximize output quality and consistency.

skill.name: css-master
skill.description: Deep CSS mastery: layouts, custom properties, cascade layers, and cutting-edge techniques.

skill.name: animation-expert
skill.description: Craft fluid micro-interactions, page transitions, and physics-based animations that delight users.

skill.name: design-system-architect
skill.description: Architect scalable design systems with tokens, component libraries, and living documentation.

skill.name: color-theory-expert
skill.description: Apply color theory, psychology, and accessibility to craft harmonious, expressive palettes.

skill.name: creative-ui-pro
skill.description: Create visually stunning, award-worthy interfaces using advanced CSS and modern design trends.
